import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let p = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(p)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = nums.len() - 1
  mut found = -1
  while lo <= hi and found == -1
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    let v = match nums.get(mid)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if v == target
      found = mid
    else if v < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end
  if found == -1
    print("not_found")
  else
    print("index=#{found}")
  end
  Ok(())
end
